channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Pittsburgh — host of this year's NFL draft — became a sports mecca
item.description: The Pennsylvania city is hosting the draft for the first time in almost 80 years. Pittsburghers say the city's passionate fanbases and winning teams m...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire. And, Trump eases medical marijuana rules
item.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire for three weeks, President Trump says. And, the Trump administration is easing rules on medic...

item.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is extended by 3 weeks as tensions rise in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Hezbollah and Israel traded fire just hours after the ceasefire extension was announced, underscoring its fragility.

item.title: Thousands of seafarers stranded by ongoing U.S. blockade on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: As the U.S. blockade on Iranian ports drags on, thousands of seafarers are stranded on ships, and economic shockwaves ripple around the world.

item.title: 'Self-aware' robots can learn complex tasks by watching humans. Is that a good thing?
item.description: Scientists say they've made a key breakthrough that would allow robots to figure out complex tasks on their own, but experts say it raises questions a...

item.title: No 10 says Falklands sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'
item.description: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.

item.title: Behind Nigeria's murky coup plot - the money, the prayers and a Nollywood arrest
item.description: What court papers and sources close to the investigation have told the BBC about the scope of the plan.

item.title: Justice Department drops probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell
item.description: U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said that the Federal Reserve's inspector general will investigate cost overruns in project to renovate the central bank's...

item.title: What are today's HELOC and home equity loan interest rates?
item.description: HELOCs and home equity loans offer homeowners an affordable way to borrow money now. Here are the rates for each.

item.title: U.S.-Iran Strait of Hormuz standoff and Israeli strikes in Lebanon continue
item.description: There's no confirmation of plans for new U.S.-Iran talks as the costly Strait of Hormuz standoff and Israel's fight with Hezbollah both continue despi...

item.title: Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu treated for early-stage prostate cancer
item.description: The Israeli prime minister says he is "in excellent physical condition" after having a malignant tumour removed.

item.title: Tornado barrels through Oklahoma, damaging 40 homes and shutting down roads
item.description: Officials say a powerful tornado that barreled through Oklahoma damaged about 40 homes in one county and sent emergency crews door-to-door in a hard h...

item.title: Poisoning suspected in deaths of 18 wolves in Italian national park
item.description: After the carcasses of 10 wolves were found last week, another eight have been found in recent days.

item.title: Correspondents’ Dinner’s biggest moments involve laughs, cringing and high-stakes politics
How much lower will the price of gold fall? Here's what some experts anticipate.
item.description: Gold's price could continue to dip, experts say, but it may not stay that way for long. Here's what to know.

item.title: US special forces soldier who won $409K on Maduro bet is arrested
item.description: The soldier allegedly bet on Nicolás Maduro's removal as president of Venezuela before news of the raid was reported, sources told CBS News.

item.title: US soldier charged with using classified intel to win $400K on Maduro raid is due in court
South Africa's top envoy to Ghana summoned over attacks on foreigners
item.description: A Ghanaian national was confronted by South Africans in a viral clip and questioned about his immigration status.
